creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, try the patch at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/exim/update-4.77-to-4.80.diff
it upgrades Exim to the version 4.80 and adds the patch that
will fix the 'twist' directive for TCP wrappers.

Any feedback with testing results is welcome.
-- 
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
[ Life's unfair - but root password helps!           | codelabs.ru ]
